items.summary: TypeScript is a superset of JavaScript that compiles to clean JavaScript output.

items.title: catchorg/Catch2
items.summary: A modern, C++-native, test framework for unit-tests, TDD and BDD - using C++14, C++17 and later (C++11 support is in v2.x branch, and C++03 on the Catch1.x branch)

items.title: TencentCloud/TencentDB-Agent-Memory
items.summary: TencentDB Agent Memory delivers fully local long-term memory for AI Agents via a 4-tier progressive pipeline, with zero external API dependencies.

items.summary: CLI tool for configuring and monitoring Claude Code

items.summary: Mesh optimization library that makes meshes smaller and faster to render

items.summary: The easiest, most secure way to use WireGuard and 2FA.

items.title: google-labs-code/stitch-skills
items.summary: A library of Agent Skills designed to work with the Stitch MCP server. Each skill follows the Agent Skills open standard, for compatibility with coding agents such as Antigravity, Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Cursor.

items.title: iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI
items.summary: OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.

items.title: hashicorp/terraform
items.summary: Terraform enables you to safely and predictably create, change, and improve infrastructure. It is a source-available tool that codifies APIs into declarative configuration files that can be shared amongst team members, treated as code, edited, reviewed, and versioned.

items.title: grpc/grpc
items.summary: C++ based gRPC (C++, Python, Ruby, Objective-C, PHP, C#)
